about.heading: Healing Rooted in Faith
about.body: At Memorare Counseling, we believe that true healing encompasses the whole person — mind, body, and soul. Named after the beloved Memorare prayer, our practice is grounded in the conviction that no one who seeks help is ever left unaided. We integrate proven clinical methods with the richness of the Catholic faith tradition to help you find peace, clarity, and wholeness.
about.body2: Whether you are navigating anxiety, grief, relationship struggles, or a desire for deeper spiritual growth, we are here to walk with you. Our licensed therapists provide a safe, compassionate space where your faith is honored and your humanity is respected.

services.name: Individual counseling
services.description: One-on-one sessions addressing anxiety, depression, life transitions, and personal growth through a faith-integrated lens.

services.name: Grief & Loss
services.description: Compassionate support for those mourning the loss of a loved one, processing trauma, or navigating major life changes.

pricing.name: Initial Consultation
pricing.description: A brief introductory call to discuss your needs and determine if we are a good fit.

pricing.name: Individual Session
pricing.description: Standard individual counseling session with a licensed counselor. Sliding scale available based on need.

counselor.name: Katie Clemente, LCSW
counselor.title: Founder & Therapist
counselor.bio: Katie is a Licensed Clinical Social Worker and the founder of Memorare Counseling, PLLC. She is passionate about integrating the Catholic faith with evidence-based therapeutic approaches to help clients find healing and wholeness.

footer.quote: Remember, O most gracious Virgin Mary, that never was it known that anyone who fled to thy protection, implored thy help, or sought thine intercession was left unaided.
